timeline.lyric: They were fighting when I slipped away
timeline.real_meaning: The elite exit strategy: The billionaire retreats to the bunker, the CEO steps down with a golden parachute while the system burns.
timeline.core: The billionaire retreats to the bunker.

media.query: Wide shot: The Mage quietly slips down from his rock while the tribe is completely distracted by their civil war.

timeline.lyric: Grabbed my hedgehog, didn't stay

media.query: Wide shot: A Gralhista spots the fleeing Mage. The tribe immediately stops fighting and rushes toward him.

timeline.core_pt: Leve apenas o que é real.

timeline.core_pt_pt: Leva apenas o que é real.
timeline.real_meaning_pt_pt: A pegar apenas o que é real: O Mago apanha o ouriço (Revolução)—o único elemento autêntico e natural no meio de tanta artifício.

timeline.lyric: Just one look back to see the scene
timeline.real_meaning: The backward glance of regret: Lot's wife, the rearview mirror. The momentary guilt of leaving the chaos you personally engineered.
timeline.core: The guilt of leaving the chaos.
